description: Indaptus Therapeutics, Inc., a clinical biotechnology company, engages in the development of various anti-cancer and anti-viral immunotherapy products. Its lead clinical candidate consists of Decoy20, which is used to produce single agent activity and/or combination therapy-based durable responses of lymphoma, hepatocellular, colorectal, and pancreatic tumors, and chronic hepatitis B virus, and human immunodeficiency virus infection, as well as for the treatment of advanced solid tumors. The company was formerly known as Intec Parent, Inc. and changed its name to Indaptus Therapeutics, Inc. in
